 |open
 |pair

}}{{#switch:{{{3|pair}}}

}}</tt><noinclude>

</noinclude>

revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |close |single = |open |pair |#default = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}}> }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |single = |open |close |pair |#default = {{{content|}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |open |single = |close |pair |#default = </{{{1|tag}}}> }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |single = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} /> }} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open |p|pair = >{{{content|}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Established convention uses "..." to seperate begin- and end tags with no content.
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding |e and |empty, to use industry-standard terms from the specs, instead of just WP's own made-up labels that no one's apt to remember. And |closed ("close" as an adjective doesn't mean the same thing, it means "nearby")
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |c|closed|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: rm |closed; I was misremembering the usage; if we added something less telegraphic, it would be |closing; putting switch parameters in same order in each section
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open |p|pair = >{{{content|}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Established convention uses "..." to seperate begin- and end tags with no content.
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Not that I see the point of substing this, but let's make it not dump parser functions all over the place when it is.
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Restored "type" and "name" (parameter –names– that must've been removed accidentally), corrected code heading
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{type|{{{2|pair}}}}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{type|{{{2|pair}}}}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{type|{{{2|pair}}}}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}|!--|-->|</{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding |e and |empty, to use industry-standard terms from the specs, instead of just WP's own made-up labels that no one's apt to remember. And |closed ("close" as an adjective doesn't mean the same thing, it means "nearby")
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |c|closed|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: rm |closed; I was misremembering the usage; if we added something less telegraphic, it would be |closing; putting switch parameters in same order in each section
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: And HTML 5.1 now calls them "void" elements, so permit that as well.
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open = |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open |p|pair = <{{#if:{{{link|}}}|[[HTML element#{{{1|tag}}}|{{{1|tag}}}]]|{{{1|tag}}}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open |p|pair = >{{{content|}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Established convention uses "..." to seperate begin- and end tags with no content.
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Not that I see the point of substing this, but let's make it not dump parser functions all over the place when it is.
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Restored "type" and "name" (parameter –names– that must've been removed accidentally), corrected code heading
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{type|{{{2|pair}}}}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{type|{{{2|pair}}}}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{type|{{{2|pair}}}}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}|!--|-->|</{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding |e and |empty, to use industry-standard terms from the specs, instead of just WP's own made-up labels that no one's apt to remember. And |closed ("close" as an adjective doesn't mean the same thing, it means "nearby")
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |c|closed|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: rm |closed; I was misremembering the usage; if we added something less telegraphic, it would be |closing; putting switch parameters in same order in each section
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: And HTML 5.1 now calls them "void" elements, so permit that as well.
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open = |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open |p|pair = <{{#if:{{{link|}}}|[[HTML element#{{{1|tag}}}|{{{1|tag}}}]]|{{{1|tag}}}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open |p|pair = >{{{content|}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Established convention uses "..." to seperate begin- and end tags with no content.
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Not that I see the point of substing this, but let's make it not dump parser functions all over the place when it is.
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = >{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = </{{{1|tag}}}> }} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Restored "type" and "name" (parameter –names– that must've been removed accidentally), corrected code heading
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{type|{{{2|pair}}}}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{type|{{{2|pair}}}}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{type|{{{2|pair}}}}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}|!--|-->|</{{{name|{{{1|tag}}}}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |s|single |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding |e and |empty, to use industry-standard terms from the specs, instead of just WP's own made-up labels that no one's apt to remember. And |closed ("close" as an adjective doesn't mean the same thing, it means "nearby")
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |c|closed|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: rm |closed; I was misremembering the usage; if we added something less telegraphic, it would be |closing; putting switch parameters in same order in each section
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: And HTML 5.1 now calls them "void" elements, so permit that as well.
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open = |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open |p|pair = <{{#if:{{{link|}}}|[[HTML element#{{{1|tag}}}|{{{1|tag}}}]]|{{{1|tag}}}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: These are called attributes; no one who does HTML calls them "parameters".
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open |p|pair = <{{#if:{{{link|}}}|[[HTML element#{{{1|tag}}}|{{{1|tag}}}]]|{{{1|tag}}}}}{{#if:{{{params|{{{attribs|}}}}}}| {{{params|{{{attribs}}}}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single|v|void |o|open = |c|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding |e and |empty, to use industry-standard terms from the specs, instead of just WP's own made-up labels that no one's apt to remember. And |closed ("close" as an adjective doesn't mean the same thing, it means "nearby")
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |c|closed|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: rm |closed; I was misremembering the usage; if we added something less telegraphic, it would be |closing; putting switch parameters in same order in each section
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|close |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding |e and |empty, to use industry-standard terms from the specs, instead of just WP's own made-up labels that no one's apt to remember. And |closed ("close" as an adjective doesn't mean the same thing, it means "nearby")
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = |e|empty|s|single |o|open |p|pair = <{{{1|tag}}}{{#if:{{{params|}}}| {{{params}}}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |c|closed|close = {{{content|}}} |e|empty|s|single = /> |o|open = >{{{content|}}} |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--||>}}{{{content|...}}} }}{{#switch:{{{2|pair}}} |e|empty|s|single |o|open = |c|closed|close |p|pair = {{#ifeq:{{{1|tag}}}|!--|-->|</{{{1|tag}}}>}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: rm |closed; I was misremembering the usage; if we added something less telegraphic, it would be |closing; putting switch parameters in same order in each section
